query:
-- Add sync metadata columns to kb_product_innovations
ALTER TABLE kb_product_innovations
  ADD COLUMN originInstanceId VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '数据来源系统实例ID（同步用）',
  ADD COLUMN remoteId INT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '远程系统中的原始ID（同步用）',
  ADD COLUMN syncVersion INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '同步版本号',
  ADD COLUMN lastSyncedAt TIMESTAMP NULL COMMENT '最后同步时间',
  ADD INDEX idx_originInstance (originInstanceId),
  ADD INDEX idx_syncVersion (syncVersion);

-- Add sync metadata columns to kb_listing_copywriting
ALTER TABLE kb_listing_copywriting
  ADD COLUMN originInstanceId VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN remoteId INT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN syncVersion INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN lastSyncedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD INDEX idx_originInstance (originInstanceId),
  ADD INDEX idx_syncVersion (syncVersion);

-- Add sync metadata columns to kb_image_sets
ALTER TABLE kb_image_sets
  ADD COLUMN originInstanceId VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN remoteId INT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN syncVersion INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN lastSyncedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD INDEX idx_originInstance (originInstanceId),
  ADD INDEX idx_syncVersion (syncVersion);

-- Add sync metadata columns to kb_operation_skills
ALTER TABLE kb_operation_skills
  ADD COLUMN originInstanceId VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN remoteId INT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN syncVersion INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN lastSyncedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD INDEX idx_originInstance (originInstanceId),
  ADD INDEX idx_syncVersion (syncVersion);

-- Add sync metadata columns to kb_videos
ALTER TABLE kb_videos
  ADD COLUMN originInstanceId VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN remoteId INT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN syncVersion INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN lastSyncedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD INDEX idx_originInstance (originInstanceId),
  ADD INDEX idx_syncVersion (syncVersion);

-- Enhance kb_sync_logs with additional tracking fields
ALTER TABLE kb_sync_logs
  ADD COLUMN peerInstanceId VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '对端系统实例ID',
  ADD COLUMN itemCount INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '同步条目数',
  ADD COLUMN errorDetail TEXT COMMENT '错误详情',
  ADD INDEX idx_peerInstance (peerInstanceId);
